label: Apideck
note: Apideck Unified API MCP server giving AI agents structured access to 200+ SaaS apps across 7 unified APIs (Accounting, CRM, HRIS, File Storage, Issue Tracking, Ecommerce, ATS) plus Vault and Proxy. Dynamic mode default exposes 4 meta-tools (list_tools, describe_tool, execute_tool, list_scopes) for progressive discovery — keeps agent context lean (~1.3K tokens). Static mode exposes 360+ tools upfront. Listed for MCP and agentic SaaS-integration discovery (not an open banking account aggregator).
